page_metadata.biotools__summary: FlowGrid density-based clustering algorithm that can perform fast and accurate clustering on very large scRNA-seq data sets. It can be implemented with Scanpy for fast clustering of Scanpy Anndata.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FlowGrid density-based clustering algorithm that can perform fast and accurate clustering on very large scRNA-seq data sets. It can be implemented with Scanpy for fast clustering of Scanpy Anndata.
